meaning: n.伯利兹城(洪都拉斯首都)
examples: I want to travel around Belize and Central America.
Next year he wants to go to university to study Chinese, but now he's living in Belize.
Find more information and an interactive calendar on the Belize Tourism Board website.
He said he had been to Belize, Afghanistan, Mozambique and Cuba, among other places.
